description_long: This is a rectangular desk with a two-tone design, featuring a warm brown wooden top and a white painted frame. The front side has a single wide drawer with two round knobs, and the drawer is framed by subtle decorative molding. Below the main surface, there is a lower shelf spanning the width of the desk, providing additional storage or display space. The legs are straight and slightly tapered, giving the desk a classic yet modern appearance. The back of the desk is plain, with no visible hardware or decorative features, and the sides are solid with open leg space beneath the drawer.
description: A two-tone desk with a brown wooden top, white frame, single front drawer, and a lower shelf for storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide drawer with two knobs, decorative molding, and the lower shelf.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the desk's depth, solid leg, and the thickness of the wooden top.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain surface with no hardware or decoration, and the lower shelf visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid leg and desk depth.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawer and knobs is intended to face the user, serving as the functional front of the desk, while the plain side is the back.
attribute_usage_context: entryway console table for mail, keys, and decorative items
